name: Parx Materials N.V.
summary: Parx Materials N.V. develops, manufactures, and markets antibacterial/antimicrobial plastics worldwide. The company offers its products for food safety, to clean water supply and drainage, to prevent mould and material deterioration, for medical applications, and for hygiene applications. It holds a patented technology under the Saniconcentrates name. The company was formerly known as Parx Plastics N.V. and changed its name to Parx Materials N.V. in January 2020. Parx Materials N.V. was founded in 2012 and is headquartered in Rotterdam, the Netherlands.
